profile.name: Ayan Ahmed
profile.title: MERN Stack Developer | React Native Specialist
profile.summary: Motivated MERN Stack Developer with a strong background in React Native, React JS, and Node.js. Robust problem-solver with experience shipping mobile apps, websites, and admin panels from scratch, including full API integration. Skilled in project management and team leadership, having trained interns and led semester projects. Focused on continuous learning and growth across software, app, and web development.

points: Joined as a mid-level React Native developer and was later re-hired and promoted by my supervisor based on demonstrated skills.
Expanded into Node.js development, strengthening full-stack development capabilities.
Worked as a remote React Native developer, building 2 mobile apps from scratch including full API integration.
Both apps were published and uploaded to the Google Play Store.
Worked as a React Native developer and trained interns on the team.
Estimated project timelines for clients and consistently delivered every project 5 days ahead of deadline.
Delivered freelance projects since 2021, building mobile apps, websites, and admin panels for clients worldwide.
Handled full-stack delivery including Node.js backend development.
